asset_name: GHK-Cu Wound-Healing and Matrix-Remodelling Preclinical Evidence
status: PRIMARY PRECLINICAL PUBLICATIONS IDENTIFIED — FULL EXTRACTION OPEN
domain: Fibroblast collagen synthesis and animal wound models
extracted_summary: Primary publications exist for fibroblast collagen synthesis and topical animal wound-healing models.
The evidence base is preclinical and route-specific.
No human injectable therapeutic conclusion is supported.
limitations: Complete study methods and numerical outcomes remain open.
Animal topical wound findings do not establish injectable human benefit.
permitted_claims: GHK-Cu has preclinical fibroblast and animal wound-healing evidence.
prohibited_claims: Human wound-healing efficacy claims without direct clinical evidence.
Injection protocol or systemic safety claims.
